tasks.description: Inventory only newly raised reviewer follow-up questions.
tasks.completion_predicate: Every new question has a stable thread-local ID and no old issue is added.

tasks.description: Draft evidence-bounded answers for applicable reviewer threads.
tasks.completion_predicate: Each new question is answered or honestly unresolved with evidence references.

tasks.description: Carry commitments and limitations and reject contradictions with rebuttals.
tasks.completion_predicate: No commitment or limitation is dropped and no prior response is contradicted.

tasks.description: Publish one final response per applicable reviewer as the same coordinator.
tasks.completion_predicate: All applicable final follow-ups are schema-valid, immutable, and coordinator-published.
